title.rendered: Build and Automate Cloud Security Checks with Prowler + Cursor

content.rendered:
Join us for a live session where we’ll walk through how to create your own security checks and automated remediations (fixers) using Prowler. You’ll learn how to customize assessments for your environment, use third-party rules via Prowler Studio MCP, and integrate everything with Cursor to surface results where your team works.

This session is hands-on, technical, and made for engineers who want more control over how cloud security gets done.

What we’ll cover:

  • Writing your own checks and fixers in Prowler

  • Importing and using community or vendor-built checks from MCP

  • Integrating Prowler with Cursor to streamline detection and action

Whether you’re building guardrails or running incident response, this will show you how to move fast—without skipping security.
